action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet50-FCN baseline reached mIoU=0.2838 after 15 epochs (val peak 0.2799, loss down to ~0.9, still underfitting with slow gains). Pipeline is now stable (DataParallel on 4 GPUs, label remapping, JSONL logging, batched predict with resize+NN upsample, best.pt). Analysis: Simple 1x1 classifier limits performance on ADE20K; adding full ASPP (with image pooling, atrous rates, BN+ReLU+dropout) creates DeepLabV3-style head for better multi-scale context without changing backbone (stays under 1B params, uses pre-downloaded ResNet). Higher LR=5e-4 + 20 epochs + poly scheduler should yield ~0.33+ mIoU. Decision: Update model.py with ASPP+DeepLab head, adjust train.py to 20 epochs/LR=5e-4, run training then immediately submit_eval on best.pt to get new score + confirm ~2.5h timing before further upgrades (e.g. MIT-B5 or mmseg).
